About Me

Turning curiosity
into creation.

I'm a Computer Science & Engineering student in my final year at Guru Nanak Dev Polytechnic College, Ludhiana. From an early age, the idea of machines that can learn and adapt fascinated me — and that curiosity has shaped everything I've built.

Currently working as an AI Intern at Patterwal DevOps Engineers Pvt. Ltd., I'm gaining real-world exposure to machine learning pipelines, AI-based application development, and production-level problem solving.

Outside of code, I'm driven by robotics, IoT tinkering, and the ambition to build AI systems that genuinely make life easier.
